summary: Completed comprehensive static verification of Android Kotlin offline translator app with all requested features properly implemented

static_verification_limitations.limitation: Cannot test Vosk model loading without Android device
static_verification_limitations.recommendation: Test on physical device or emulator

static_verification_limitations.limitation: Cannot test ML Kit model downloads without network
static_verification_limitations.recommendation: Test with network connectivity on device

static_verification_limitations.limitation: Cannot test audio recording and TTS without device
static_verification_limitations.recommendation: Test with microphone and speakers on device

passed_tests: Model Manager dialog layout verification - SwitchMaterial for simple/advanced mode toggle
Vosk model entries implementation - buildVoskModelEntries() creates EN/ES/FR/DE entries
Advanced mode ML Kit integration - buildMlKitEntry() with download/remove actions
Export options dialog - AlertDialog with TXT/PDF/CSV options properly implemented
FileProvider configuration - AndroidManifest.xml and file_paths.xml properly configured
Export functionality - All 3 formats (TXT/PDF/CSV) with proper file creation and sharing
Favorites toggle implementation - toggleFavoritesFilter() and updateFavoritesUi() working
Star icon updates - ConversationAdapter properly handles ic_star_filled/ic_star_outline
Confidence indicator - message_confidence TextView shows for USER messages only
Confidence parsing - parseRecognitionResult() extracts confidence from Vosk JSON
Push-to-talk toggle - setupPushToTalkToggle() prevents auto-restart when enabled
Wake lock management - acquireWakeLock()/releaseWakeLock() in start/stop listening
WAKE_LOCK permission - Properly declared in AndroidManifest.xml
Phrasebook dialog - showPhrasebook() with 8 EN/ES phrase pairs
Onboarding implementation - showOnboardingIfNeeded() with proper preference tracking
Export history tracking - loadExportHistory()/saveExportHistory() with timestamp format
Audio effects setup - Noise suppression, echo cancellation, AGC properly implemented
Multi-language support - EN/ES/FR/DE with proper voice selection per language
Silence timeout configuration - SeekBar with proper range and preference storage
Mic level meter - Peak hold implementation with smoothing and dB calculation
Search functionality - applySearchFilter() with favorites integration
Speaker selection - setupSpeakerSpinner() with preference storage
Resource organization - All strings, colors, themes, and layouts properly defined
